# cyberpunk-2077-theme-css (retro-cyberpunk-2077-theme)

**Upstream:** https://github.com/gwannon/Cyberpunk-2077-theme-css
**Demo:** example1.png, example2.png, example3.png (screenshots in repo)
**License:** GPLv3 — see LICENSE

## What it looks like
Same yellow/cyan-on-black Cyberpunk 2077 UI vocabulary as alddesign/cyberpunk-css but
styled as a *theme layer* — applies over existing HTML structure without prescribing layout.
Smaller surface. Focus on typographic + color treatment.

## What it offers
- Single theme CSS file
- Decorative brackets and corner markers
- Uppercase Rajdhani-style sans (font suggestion, not bundled)

## Clawmachine fit
LOW priority — duplicates alddesign/cyberpunk-css at smaller scope and under GPL
(which we don't want entangled even in reference). Keep for cross-referencing.
GPL means code cannot be mixed into Clawmachine app source; reference-only.
